task: 5 teweets about todays stock market news
messages: 1/5: 🚨 *Market Alert* 🚨: Stocks are experiencing high volatility today! 📈📉 What's driving this trend? 🤔 [Learn more](https://example.com)
2/5: *_Trend Alert_*: AI is revolutionizing the stock market! 🤖 How will this impact your investments? 📊 Share your thoughts! 💬
3/5: *Economic Outlook*: The global economy is shifting! 🌎 How will this affect the stock market? 📉 [Get insights](https://example.com) and stay ahead of the curve!
4/5: `Stock Watch`: Which stocks are making headlines today? 📰 [Check our analysis](https://example.com) and discover the top performers! 📈
5/5: *Market Recap*: Today's market activity in a nutshell! 🌰 What can we expect tomorrow? 🤔 Share your predictions! 💬 [Join the discussion](https://example.com)

task: Create 3 engaging Telegram messages for "NeuralForge AI" — a Bangalore-based startup that builds AI automation tools for small businesses in India. Target audience: small business owners aged 25-45 who struggle with repetitive tasks like invoicing, inventory, and customer follow-ups. Tone: friendly, inspiring, relatable. Include a mix of educational content, a success story angle, and a strong CTA.
messages:
---MESSAGE 1---
🚀 Boost your business with AI automation! 🤖 Did you know that automating repetitive tasks like invoicing and inventory management can increase productivity by up to 30%? 💼 Learn how NeuralForge AI can help you streamline your operations and drive growth. [Learn More](https://neuralforge.ai) What's holding you back from automating your business?

messages:
